title: LIP-LOSS-001 MBPP64 train-set in-sample bridge evaluation
interpretation: The LIP-LOSS-001 configuration reduced in-sample off-diagonal similarity and improved diagonal margin relative to LIP-EVAL-021.
The same run worsened MSE, cosine diagonal, norm ratio, and energy drift relative to the previous lambda_mse=0.35 baseline.
This suggests the new loss adds useful separation pressure but the first weighting over-penalizes ranking/margin relative to reconstruction and norm calibration.
This remains latent-space diagnostic evaluation only.
known_limitations: The evaluation uses the training bundle and is in-sample.
The evaluation is latent-space only and does not evaluate text-level semantic fidelity.
The result does not establish semantic transfer, model-to-model alignment, generalization, or production readiness.
data_policy: No generated eval outputs, checkpoints, shards, bundles, datasets, zips, caches, or run artifacts are committed.
scientific_claim_status: Latent-space diagnostic evaluation only. No semantic transfer, text-level fidelity, model-to-model alignment, or production readiness claim.
